title: Section 64
content: 64. Recovery of 1 [penalty or compensation].--A 2 [penalty imposed or compensation awarded] under this Act, if it is not paid, shall he recovered as an arrear of land revenue and the licence or the 3 [electronic signature] Certificate, as the case may be, shall be suspended till the penalty is paid.
footnote: 1Subs. by Act 10 of 2009, s. 31, for "penalty" (w.e.f. 27-10-2009). 2. Subs. by s. 31, ibid., for "penalty imposed" (w.e.f. 27-10-2009). 3. Subs. by s. 2, ibid., for "Digital Signature" (w.e.f. 27-10-2009).
